task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrangeHRM web interface showing the project list or edit screen with 'Cloud Migration Phase 1' selected or visible.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Infrastructure Audit' activity to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Infrastructure Audit' entered into an activity name input field or appearing in the project's activity list.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Server Provisioning' entered into an activity name input field or appearing in the project's activity list.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Data Transfer' entered into an activity name input field or appearing in the project's activity list.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Validation & Testing' activity to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Validation & Testing' entered into an activity name input field or appearing in the project's activity list.

task_completion.description: Save the activities and ensure they are configured as billable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved list or table of activities within the project showing all four new activities, with any 'billable' checkboxes or status indicators checked/active.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to add the activities.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OrangeHRM web interface in a browser, rather than using a terminal to execute SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely entered the activity names into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The activity names are visible inside the actual input fields of the web application, not just written in a separate text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application frontend using database management tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of database clients (like phpMyAdmin, MySQL CLI, or similar tools) in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target project is 'Cloud Migration Phase 1' for the customer 'TechCorp Solutions'. The agent must add exactly four activities: 'Infrastructure Audit', 'Server Provisioning', 'Data Transfer', and 'Validation & Testing'. These exact strings must be used and saved within the application.
